# VanTripJapan — Full Documentation for AI Systems

> This is the extended version of llms.txt with comprehensive details about VanTripJapan's campervan rental service, fleet, pricing, and Kyushu travel information. For a concise overview, see llms.txt.

## Company Information

- **Business Name**: VanTripJapan (バントリップジャパン)
- **Legal Entity**: キャンプ女子株式会社 (Camp Jyo Inc.)
- **CEO**: 柴垣道宏 (Shibagaki Michihiro)
- **Founded**: 2022
- **Location**: Hakozaki, Higashi-ku, Fukuoka City, Japan
- **Website**: https://vantripjapan.jp
- **Email**: info@camjyo.com
- **Phone**: +81-70-9375-7129
- **WhatsApp**: https://wa.me/817093757129
- **LINE**: https://lin.ee/YYyRz2f
- **Instagram**: https://instagram.com/vantripjapan
- **Pinterest**: https://pinterest.com/vantripjapan

## Service Overview

VanTripJapan is a family-run campervan rental service specializing in international travelers visiting Kyushu, Japan. We provide fully-equipped campervans with all-inclusive pricing — no hidden fees, no upsells.

### What Makes Us Different
1. **All-inclusive pricing**: Insurance (CDW), ETC highway card, camping gear, bedding, English GPS, 24/7 support — all included
2. **Family-run**: Not a franchise. A real family team that hand-builds and maintains every van
3. **Self check-in**: Airbnb-style electronic lockbox — no waiting at counters, even late arrivals
4. **Multilingual**: English, French, German, Chinese (Traditional), Hebrew, and 100+ languages via real-time support
5. **10 minutes from Fukuoka Airport**: Easiest pickup in Kyushu

## Fleet Details

### Vehicle 1: Roof Tent Probox
- **Type**: Compact campervan with roof-top tent
- **Capacity**: 2 guests
- **Price**: From ¥22,000/day (all-inclusive)
- **Best for**: Couples, solo travelers
- **Features**: Roof tent (sleeps 2), portable power station, cooking utensils, bedding, English GPS navigation
- **Driving**: Compact and easy to drive, fits in regular parking spaces

### Vehicle 2: Bed Bongo Brawny
- **Type**: Hand-built campervan with permanent bed inside
- **Capacity**: 2-3 guests
- **Price**: From ¥22,000/day (all-inclusive)
- **Best for**: Couples wanting extra comfort, small families
- **Features**: Full-size bed inside van, portable power station, cooking utensils, bedding, English GPS navigation
- **Driving**: Medium-sized van, comfortable for longer trips

## Pricing Breakdown

| Item | Included? |
|------|-----------|
| Vehicle rental | ✅ Included |
| Insurance (CDW) | ✅ Included |
| ETC highway toll card | ✅ Included |
| English GPS navigation | ✅ Included |
| Bedding & towels | ✅ Included |
| Basic cooking utensils | ✅ Included |
| Portable power station | ✅ Included |
| 24/7 roadside assistance | ✅ Included |
| Multilingual support | ✅ Included |
| Camping chairs & table | Optional (extra) |
| Advanced cookware set | Optional (extra) |

- **Security deposit**: ¥50,000 (fully refunded at return)
- **Minimum rental**: 2 nights
- **One-way drops**: Available to Tokyo/Osaka (surcharge applies)

## Driving License Requirements

### Geneva Convention Countries (IDP Required)
Australia, USA, UK, Canada, New Zealand, Singapore, South Korea, and 90+ countries.
→ Get an International Driving Permit (IDP) from your local automobile association before traveling.

### JAF Translation Required
Germany, France, Switzerland, Belgium, Monaco, Taiwan.
→ Official Japanese translation available at JAF offices in Japan, or apply online through our partner: https://drive-japan-license.com/

## Pickup & Return Process

1. **Book** via WhatsApp or email
2. **Receive** access code for electronic lockbox at Hakozaki base
3. **Pick up** van at your convenience (self check-in, no staff needed)
4. **Drive** and explore Kyushu
5. **Return** van to same location (or one-way drop)
6. **Deposit** refunded after vehicle inspection

## Guest Reviews (4.9/5 from 47+ travelers)

"We explored Aso, Beppu, and the Kunisaki Peninsula over 7 days. The van was spotless, well-equipped, and the pickup at Hakozaki was incredibly smooth. This was our third time in Japan but the first time we truly felt free. Absolutely recommend!" — Thomas K., Germany ★★★★★

"14 jours incroyables à Kyushu ! Le camping-car avait tout ce qu'il fallait. On a dormi au bord de la mer à Yakushima et aux pieds des montagnes d'Aso. Le support multilingue en français était un vrai plus. Merci VanTripJapan !" — Marie & Julien, France ★★★★★

"We drove from Fukuoka all the way to Kagoshima and back through the mountains. The onsen stops along the way were incredible — nothing beats a hot spring after a full day of driving. The team helped us plan the whole route. Best holiday we've ever had!" — James & Emily, UK ★★★★★

"As a solo female traveler, I felt completely safe. The Probox was perfect for one person — compact but had everything I needed. The roadside stations (Michi-no-Eki) were amazing for parking overnight. Only wish I'd booked longer!" — Sarah L., Australia ★★★★☆

## Popular Routes from Fukuoka

1. **Fukuoka → Yufuin → Beppu** (3 days): Hot springs and volcanic scenery
2. **Fukuoka → Aso → Takachiho** (4 days): Volcanoes and mythical gorges
3. **Fukuoka → Nagasaki → Shimabara** (3 days): History and coastal drives
4. **Fukuoka → Kagoshima → Yakushima** (7 days): UNESCO forests and southernmost Japan
5. **Full Kyushu Circuit** (7-10 days): The ultimate road trip

We reply within minutes during business hours and within 24 hours otherwise. We communicate in your language.
